headline: Is Starbucks open on Easter?
summary: Just because it’s a holiday weekend doesn’t mean you can live without coffee. So if a Starbucks run is part of your Sunday routine, you may be wondering whether you can still grab that dirty chai latte or mocha this holiday. Starbucks does not enforce a company-wide holiday schedule, meaning ...
